title: Leah's Freight Pack
description:
Smaller LCR pack that adds the Freight Locomotives and Carriages in a resource pack.
Over 64+ variants of freight wagons all condensed into one pack.
body:
An MTR4 exclusive Resource Pack that adds freight cars and wagons to the pack with the aim of providing the Community with freight traction to serve as part of one's industrial network.

This pack includes over 90+ variants of the following freight cars:

<details>
<summary>Locomotives</summary>

<details>
<summary>Class 90</summary>

<details>
<summary>Specifications</summary>

- Acceleration: 0.4m/s²
- Decceleration: 0.6m/s²
- Max Speed: 110mph
- Era: 1980s
- Power: Alternating Current Electric
- Mode: Freight, High Speed, Express, Intercity
- Motors/Prime Movers: HSP

</details>

<details>
<summary>Liveries</summary>

- Deutsche Bahn
- Freightliner

</details>

</details>

</details>
